title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Extension Lens: Script Tests
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext script tests increment in a skill test and release harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
